# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - prepare
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  GIT_DEPTH: "0"

default:
  image: alpine:3.19
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache git curl jq bash
    - git config --global user.email "${GITLAB_USER_EMAIL:-ci@example.com}"
    - git config --global user.name "${GITLAB_USER_NAME:-GitLab CI}"

prepare_mr_metadata:
  stage: prepare
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail
      mkdir -p ci
      MR_TITLE="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-}"
      MR_DESCRIPTION="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION:-}"
      MR_IID="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-}"
      if [ -z "$MR_TITLE" ] && [ -n "${CI_COMMIT_SHA:-}" ]; then
        MR_JSON="$(curl --silent --show-error --header "JOB-TOKEN: $CI_JOB_TOKEN" "${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/repository/commits/${CI_COMMIT_SHA}/merge_requests")"
        MR_TITLE="$(echo "$MR_JSON" | jq -r '.[0].title // ""')"
        MR_DESCRIPTION="$(echo "$MR_JSON" | jq -r '.[0].description // ""')"
        MR_IID="$(echo "$MR_JSON" | jq -r '.[0].iid // ""')"
      fi
      SAFE_MR_TITLE="$(printf '%s' "$MR_TITLE" | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/[[:space:]]\+/ /g; s/[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]/-/g; s/--\+/-/g; s/^-//; s/-$//' | cut -c1-80)"
      {
        echo "MR_TITLE<<EOF"
        printf '%s\n' "$MR_TITLE"
        echo "EOF"
        echo "MR_DESCRIPTION<<EOF"
        printf '%s\n' "$MR_DESCRIPTION"
        echo "EOF"
        echo "MR_IID=$MR_IID"
        echo "SAFE_MR_TITLE=$SAFE_MR_TITLE"
      } > ci/mr_metadata.env
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: ci/mr_metadata.env
    paths:
      - ci/mr_metadata.env

build_with_mr_context:
  stage: build
  needs:
    - prepare_mr_metadata
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail
      BUILD_COMMIT_MSG="build: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
      if [ -n "${MR_TITLE:-}" ]; then
        BUILD_COMMIT_MSG="${BUILD_COMMIT_MSG} | MR: ${MR_TITLE}"
      fi
      {
        echo "Build started for ${CI_PROJECT_PATH}"
        echo "Ref: ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}"
        echo "Commit: ${CI_COMMIT_SHA}"
        echo "MR IID: ${MR_IID:-N/A}"
        echo "MR Title: ${MR_TITLE:-N/A}"
        echo "MR Description:"
        printf '%s\n' "${MR_DESCRIPTION:-N/A}"
        echo
        echo "Commit message for generated artifacts:"
        echo "${BUILD_COMMIT_MSG}"
      } | tee build_notification.txt
      mkdir -p build
      printf 'release_notes.md\n' > build/artifacts.txt
      {
        echo "# Automatic Release Notes"
        echo
        echo "- Commit: ${CI_COMMIT_SHA}"
        echo "- Ref: ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}"
        echo "- MR IID: ${MR_IID:-N/A}"
        echo "- MR Title: ${MR_TITLE:-N/A}"
        echo
        echo "## Description"
        printf '%s\n' "${MR_DESCRIPTION:-No merge request description available.}"
      } > build/release_notes.md
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
      - build_notification.txt

deploy_with_mr_tag:
  stage: deploy
  needs:
    - prepare_mr_metadata
    - build_with_mr_context
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail
      TAG_BASE="${CI_COMMIT_TAG:-deploy-${CI_PIPELINE_IID}}"
      if [ -n "${SAFE_MR_TITLE:-}" ]; then
        DEPLOY_TAG="${TAG_BASE}-${SAFE_MR_TITLE}"
      else
        DEPLOY_TAG="${TAG_BASE}"
      fi
      DEPLOY_TAG="$(printf '%s' "$DEPLOY_TAG" | cut -c1-120)"
      DEPLOY_COMMIT_MSG="deploy: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
      if [ -n "${MR_TITLE:-}" ]; then
        DEPLOY_COMMIT_MSG="${DEPLOY_COMMIT_MSG} | MR: ${MR_TITLE}"
      fi
      {
        echo "Deploying ${CI_PROJECT_PATH}"
        echo "Environment: ${CI_ENVIRONMENT_NAME:-production}"
        echo "Deployment tag: ${DEPLOY_TAG}"
        echo "Commit message: ${DEPLOY_COMMIT_MSG}"
        echo "MR Title: ${MR_TITLE:-N/A}"
        echo "MR Description:"
        printf '%s\n' "${MR_DESCRIPTION:-N/A}"
      } | tee deploy_notification.txt
      git fetch --tags origin
      git tag -a "$DEPLOY_TAG" -m "Deployment: ${DEPLOY_COMMIT_MSG}"
      git push origin "$DEPLOY_TAG"
  environment:
    name: production
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - deploy_notification.txt
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: on_success
